## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:python` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:node` passes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased section)
- [ ] Updated docs/examples if behavior or endpoints changed
- [ ] No secrets, private pineIds, or `*.local.json` committed
